content.problemStatement:
Now that we have understood the problem statement, let us write down a few more sample cases or examples.\
Review the sample input / output given in the table below.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line contains a single integer $T$ — the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
- The first and only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers $N$ and $X$ — the total number of cards and the number of cards which are initially face-up.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output the minimum number of cards you must flip so that all the cards face in the same direction.
